use_cases: Display feature highlights on SaaS landing pages with interactive hover effects
Showcase product capabilities in a dynamic grid layout
Create engaging dashboard sections with spotlight tracking
Present service offerings with cyber-futuristic aesthetics
Build modern product pages with bento-style card arrangements
ai_summary: A cyber-futuristic bento grid component featuring interactive mouse-tracking spotlight effects that illuminate cards as users hover. The dark-themed layout displays feature cards of varying sizes in a modern grid arrangement, ideal for showcasing SaaS product capabilities or dashboard widgets with a tech-forward aesthetic.
